response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive experience (18+ years) in software engineering, including leadership roles and startup involvement, his resume lacks direct evidence of AI-specific expertise, products, or platforms built with AI. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq is promising but not deeply detailed. His entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) and open-source contributions are strong, but his technical focus leans more toward web/mobile development and general infrastructure rather than cutting-edge AI strategy.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (18+ years) with leadership roles in multiple companies
Entrepreneurial background with GISCollective, demonstrating product development and open-source contributions
Strong technical versatility across languages and domains (TypeScript, Dlang, Node.js, Java, etc.)
concerns: Lacks clear evidence of AI/ML expertise or built products/platforms with AI (preferred qualification)
No Master's/PhD in AI-related field, nor explicit recognition as AI expert
Recent AI-agent work at re:cinq is not detailed enough to assess depth of AI strategy experience
